inputs.label: Uncooked Rice Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of uncooked rice to be cooked

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of uncooked rice to be cooked
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des zu kochenden ungekochten Reises
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de riz cru à cuire
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del arroz crudo a cocinar
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن الأرز غير المطبوخ المراد طهيه

inputs.label: Water to Rice Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of water volume to rice weight (e.g., 2 for 2 ml water per 1 g rice)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of water volume to rice weight (e.g., 2 for 2 ml water per 1 g rice)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Su hacminin pirinç ağırlığına oranı (örneğin, 1 g pirinç başına 2 ml su için 2)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von Wasservolumen zu Reisgewicht (z. B. 2 für 2 ml Wasser pro 1 g Reis)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio du volume d'eau par poids de riz (ex: 2 pour 2 ml d'eau pour 1 g de riz)
businessContext_i18n.es: Proporción de volumen de agua respecto al peso del arroz (ej. 2 para 2 ml de agua por 1 g de arroz)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة حجم الماء إلى وزن الأرز (مثال: 2 تعني 2 مل ماء لكل 1 جم أرز)

inputs.label: Cooked Yield Factor
inputs.businessContext: How many times the uncooked weight the cooked rice becomes (typical: 2.5-3)

label_i18n.fr: Facteur de rendement à la cuisson

businessContext_i18n.en: How many times the uncooked weight the cooked rice becomes (typical: 2.5-3)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pişmemiş ağırlığın kaç katı pişmiş pirinç elde edildiği (tipik: 2.5-3)
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie oft das ungekochte Gewicht der gekochte Reis beträgt (typisch: 2,5–3)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Combien de fois le poids cru le riz cuit devient (typique: 2,5-3)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuántas veces el peso crudo se convierte en arroz cocido (típico: 2.5-3)
businessContext_i18n.ar: كم مرة يصبح الوزن غير المطبوخ بعد الطهي (نموذجي: 2.5-3)

inputs.label: Serving Size per Person
inputs.businessContext: Amount of cooked rice per serving

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of cooked rice per serving
